category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

labels.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（不含储能）
labels.zht: 併網光伏逆變器（不含儲能）

title.en: China-to-Australia Solar Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against Australia RCM, AS/NZS 4777.2, and Clean Energy Council approved-inverter expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与澳大利亚 RCM、AS/NZS 4777.2 及 Clean Energy Council 认可逆变器要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與澳洲 RCM、AS/NZS 4777.2 及 Clean Energy Council 認可逆變器要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, electrical-safety approval, grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Australian electrical safety, RCM, AS/NZS, Clean Energy Council, and network-service-provider requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、电气安全批准、并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行澳大利亚电气安全、RCM、AS/NZS、Clean Energy Council 及配电网络服务商要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、電氣安全批准、併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行澳洲電氣安全、RCM、AS/NZS、Clean Energy Council 及配電網路服務商要求。

answer_first.en: AS/NZS 4777.2 grid compliance and Clean Energy Council approved-inverter listing are mandatory; Chinese grid-code compliance is not accepted as a substitute.
answer_first.zh: AS/NZS 4777.2 并网合规和 Clean Energy Council 认可逆变器列名是强制要求；中国电网规范合规不能替代。
answer_first.zht: AS/NZS 4777.2 併網合規和 Clean Energy Council 認可逆變器列名是強制要求；中國電網規範合規不能替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, certification body, network-service provider, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
